note: V10 (2026-04-19): V9 thresholds + new failures_only mode. When survivors==0 AND failures>=failures_only_threshold (default 20), A13 emits mode='failures_only' and applies decay-only weights (never upweights). Transitions: observe (default) -> soft (N>=3/5) -> active (N>=20/50). Hysteresis: drop to observe if survivors<1; drop active->soft if survivors<12. failures_only path is an orthogonal branch that fires before observe when survivors==0.
